name: @blazetrails/tasks
description: RFCs and structured work tracking for blazetrailsdev/trails

scripts.verify: pnpm validate && pnpm build-index && git diff --exit-code index.md || (echo 'committed index.md is stale — run pnpm build-index and recommit' >&2; exit 1)
scripts.prepare: git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .husky || true
